title: Birth of Edward Alexander Crowley
description: Born in Royal Leamington Spa to Plymouth Brethren parents.

title: The Abramelin Working
description: Attempted the rigorous Abramelin operation at Boleskine to attain the Knowledge and Conversation of his Holy Guardian Angel.

title: Reception of Liber AL vel Legis
description: Dictation of the Book of the Law by Aiwass in Cairo. Marks the beginning of the Aeon of Horus.

title: The Vision and the Voice
description: Scrying of the 30 Enochian Aethyrs with Victor Neuburg in the Algerian desert.

title: Abbey of Thelema
description: Established a commune based on Thelemic principles. Ended with Mussolini expelling Crowley from Italy.

title: Death of Aleister Crowley
description: Died in Netherwood, Hastings. His ashes were buried near a tree in Hampton, New Jersey.
